verification_pipeline.desc: Research team drafts an entry with named actor, specific conduct, and credible source(s).
A reviewer confirms it concerns a named actor + specific conduct; assigns category.
Each cited source is checked: exists, authentic, actually supports the specific claim, from a credible org.
Two independent reviewers must agree before anything advances. Disagreement escalates.
Claim phrased to match evidentiary strength; right-of-reply contact recorded; privacy/safety re-checked.
Entry goes live with sources visible and an evidence-strength label.
Rebuttals, new evidence, takedowns. Versioned audit trail on every entry.

entry_requirements: A specific named individual or entity (no 'members of group X').
A specific alleged act or role (what, where, roughly when).
At least one source from sources.tiers, with a working link or uploaded document.

rejection_rules.desc: Only Tier-C/rumor for a serious claim, no corroboration.
Exposes home address / live location / data enabling physical harm.
Names children or clearly uninvolved persons.
The source does not actually support the specific claim.
Dehumanizing or sectarian language anywhere in the entry.
